limitations: Windows cannot fsync the containing directory after control-state rename, so crash durability is reduced to file fsync plus atomic rename.
This is an initial beta candidate distributed as ralph-next; the opt-in ralph alias is not promoted.

matrix.reason: Bun 1.3.14 for Windows ARM64 lacks the bun:ffi or TinyCC capability required by the native OpenTUI renderer; headless CLI behavior remains classified separately and is not sufficient for beta promotion.
